nodes.context: Yakuza group based in Okinawa, Japan; largest yakuza organization in Okinawa Prefecture with about 300 members.
Yakuza group based in Okinawa, Japan; former parent organization of the Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai.
Yakuza group in Okinawa Prefecture; third-largest yakuza organization in the prefecture.

edges.context: The Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai was formed in 1990 when it split from the Kyokuryu-kai.
They are two separate designated yakuza groups in Okinawa, with the Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai being the largest and the Kyokuryu-kai the second-largest.
The Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai is the largest yakuza organization in Okinawa, followed by Kyokuryu-kai and Yoshimi-kogyo as third-largest.
